children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as provided in subparagraph (B), the term “market discount bond” means any bond having market discount.

children.heading: Short-term obligations
children.label: i Short-term obligations
children.text: Any obligation with a fixed maturity date not exceeding 1 year from the date of issue.

children.heading: United States savings bonds
children.label: ii United States savings bonds
children.text: Any United States savings bond.

children.heading: Installment obligations
children.label: iii Installment obligations
children.text: Any installment obligation to which section 453B applies.

children.heading: Section 1277 not applicable to tax-exempt obligations
children.label: C Section 1277 not applicable to tax-exempt obligations
children.text: For purposes of section 1277, the term “market discount bond” shall not include any tax-exempt obligation (as defined in section 1275(a)(3)).

children.heading: Treatment of bonds acquired at original issue
children.label: D Treatment of bonds acquired at original issue

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subparagraph or in regulations, the term “market discount bond” shall not include any bond acquired by the taxpayer at its original issue.

children.heading: Treatment of bonds acquired for less than issue price
children.label: ii Treatment of bonds acquired for less than issue price
I
children.text: the basis of the taxpayer in such bond is determined under section 1012, and

children.label: II
children.text: such basis is less than the issue price of such bond determined under subpart A of this part.

children.heading: Bonds acquired in certain reorganizations
children.label: iii Bonds acquired in certain reorganizations
children.text: Clause (i) shall not apply to any bond issued pursuant to a plan of reorganization (within the meaning of section 368(a)(1)) in exchange for another bond having market discount. Solely for purposes of section 1276, the preceding sentence shall not apply if such other bond was issued on or before (the date of the enactment of section 1276) and if the bond issued pursuant to such plan of reorganization has the same term and the same interest rate as such other bond had.July 18, 1984

children.heading: Treatment of certain transferred basis property
children.label: iv Treatment of certain transferred basis property
children.text: For purposes of clause (i), if the adjusted basis of any bond in the hands of the taxpayer is determined by reference to the adjusted basis of such bond in the hands of a person who acquired such bond at its original issue, such bond shall be treated as acquired by the taxpayer at its original issue.

children.label: i
children.text: the stated redemption price of the bond at maturity, over

children.label: ii
children.text: the basis of such bond immediately after its acquisition by the taxpayer.

children.heading: Coordination where bond has original issue discount
children.label: B Coordination where bond has original issue discount
children.text: In the case of any bond having original issue discount, for purposes of subparagraph (A), the stated redemption price of such bond at maturity shall be treated as equal to its revised issue price.

children.heading: De minimis rule
children.label: C De minimis rule
children.text: If the market discount is less than ¼ of 1 percent of the stated redemption price of the bond at maturity multiplied by the number of complete years to maturity (after the taxpayer acquired the bond), then the market discount shall be considered to be zero.

children.heading: Bond
children.label: 3 Bond
children.text: The term “bond” means any bond, debenture, note, certificate, or other evidence of indebtedness.

children.label: A
children.text: the issue price of the bond, and

children.label: B
children.text: the aggregate amount of the original issue discount includible in the gross income of all holders for periods before the acquisition of the bond by the taxpayer (determined without regard to section 1272(a)(7)) or, in the case of a tax-exempt obligation, the aggregate amount of the original issue discount which accrued in the manner provided by section 1272(a) (determined without regard to paragraph (7) thereof) during periods before the acquisition of the bond by the taxpayer.

children.heading: Original issue discount, etc.
children.label: 5 Original issue discount, etc.
children.text: The terms “original issue discount”, “stated redemption price at maturity”, and “issue price” have the respective meanings given such terms by subpart A of this part.

children.heading: Election to include market discount currently
children.label: b Election to include market discount currently
A
children.text: sections 1276 and 1277 shall not apply, and

children.label: B
children.text: market discount on any market discount bond shall be included in the gross income of the taxpayer for the taxable years to which it is attributable (as determined under the rules of subsection (b) of section 1276).

children.heading: Scope of election
children.label: 2 Scope of election
children.text: An election under this subsection shall apply to all market discount bonds acquired by the taxpayer on or after the 1st day of the 1st taxable year to which such election applies.

children.heading: Period to which election applies
children.label: 3 Period to which election applies
children.text: An election under this subsection shall apply to the taxable year for which it is made and for all subsequent taxable years, unless the taxpayer secures the consent of the Secretary to the revocation of such election.

children.heading: Basis adjustment
children.label: 4 Basis adjustment
children.text: The basis of any bond in the hands of the taxpayer shall be increased by the amount included in gross income pursuant to this subsection.

children.heading: Regulations
children.label: c Regulations
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary to carry out the purposes of this subpart, including regulations providing proper adjustments in the case of a bond the principal of which may be paid in 2 or more payments.
